_provenance: schema-derived from alpha_bot_execution.py:848-870 (TP arm/fire logic). TP fires when prob_beating >= acc_TAKE_PROFIT_MC_PCT AND above_tp_count >= 2 AND current_return > 0. These are state machine booleans and counts — not producer-computed percentages. The threshold comparison direction (prob_beating >= threshold causes TP fire after arming) is engine logic, not a tuned value. current_return > 0 is a sign check, not a magnitude assertion.
description: TP trigger must fire inside the 15-min grace window (grace suppresses VWAP only, not TP or Trailing Stop)
mc_prob_relationship: prob_beating >= acc_TAKE_PROFIT_MC_PCT so TP fire condition holds (above_tp_count increments to >=2)
note: TP firing inside grace window is the expected PASS-through. Grace window is VWAP-only suppression.
